philosophy.heading: Change starts with the smallest step

card1.title: Tiny Cues
card1.desc: Design environmental cues that make good habits happen naturally. Start with one small signal to trigger a chain of positive actions.

card2.title: Habit Stacking
card2.desc: Link new behaviors to existing habits, reducing the friction to start. Layer by layer, let change blend into your daily rhythm.

card3.title: Identity Shift
card3.desc: Don't just change behavior — become who you want to be. Every choice is a vote for your ideal identity.

products.heading: Ritual Essentials
products.intro: Curated objects to support your habit-building journey
products.disclaimer: These are curated recommendations, not required purchases. You're free to choose alternatives that suit you.
